title: ageratina parviceps
intro: Ageratina parviceps, also known as Small Whiteflower Ageratina, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to Mexico and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ageratina parviceps include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Ageratina parviceps can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
